title: ixeris stolonifera var. capillaris
intro: Ixeris stolonifera var. capillaris, also known as capitate creeping dandelion or creeping dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the Asteraceae family, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and creeping stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Its health benefits include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
